note: Baseline rebased after merging origin/main (PR #9, 009-password-reset) and after splitting LocationMap into a lazy chunk (recovers ~290 KB from the entry chunk). Includes the runtime cost of `motion` (Framer Motion) and `@fontsource-variable/geist` introduced by 009-ui-visual-refresh. Sizes are gzipped as reported by `vite build`. Guardrail: total gzipped MUST be <= baseline * 1.05 (SC-005). NOTE: this metric counts every emitted asset, including lazy chunks (maplibre-gl, LocationMap.impl). Initial-load (index.html + index-*.js + index-*.css) is now ~442 KB, well below the previous 694 KB baseline.
